title: (Senior) Customer Success Manager DACH (m/f/d)
required_skills: 3-5 years B2B customer success or consulting experience
SaaS or market research agency background
Client workshop facilitation and training delivery
bonus_skills: Market research background or deep insights experience
Degree in psychology, business administration, or market research
matched_skills: B2B client-facing experience (GRG Banking, IoT company pre-sales and product demos to 100+ clients)
Cross-functional collaboration (HSBC: Product, Engineering, Marketing, C-suite interface)
Data and insights orientation (Power BI certified, VOC research, KPI dashboards)
Market research and competitive intelligence (ECE Group, Intelligent Power)
Project management and agile delivery (Hapag-Lloyd, HSBC)
Degree in business/marketing-adjacent field (Master of Management & Entrepreneurship)
missing_skills: Native German language (CV shows B1+ — critical gap for a DACH-focused role)
Direct Customer Success Manager title or SaaS CSM experience
Strategic account portfolio ownership (QBRs, churn management, health score monitoring)
SaaS platform adoption and onboarding experience
Executive-level relationship management with enterprise/strategic accounts
Consumer insights platform experience (market research SaaS tools)
core_responsibilities: Own a portfolio of strategic DACH accounts and serve as primary trusted advisor, conducting regular executive check-ins and QBRs
Understand clients' complex business challenges and provide strategic guidance on leveraging consumer insights via Appinio's platform
Prepare and deliver high-impact workshops and trainings (virtual and on-site) to educate clients on modern market research
Monitor customer health scores and proactively identify churn risks and upsell/expansion opportunities
Act as the internal voice of the customer in cross-functional collaboration with Product, Research, Marketing, and Sales
recommended_emphasis: Reframe B2B pre-sales and product demo experience at GRG Banking (100+ clients) as client success and relationship management
Highlight VOC research, competitive analysis, and KPI reporting as consumer insights consulting skills relevant to Appinio's platform
Emphasize cross-functional influence and stakeholder management from HSBC (acting as interface across Product, Engineering, Marketing, C-suite)
Position Hapag-Lloyd customer experience project coordination as customer success adjacent work
Demonstrate commercial mindset through GTM execution results (4.6M CNY in signed contracts at Intelligent Power)
Acknowledge German language level honestly but highlight active improvement trajectory and strong English/Chinese multilingual profile
Lead with data-driven consulting angle: Power BI certification, structured reporting, evidence-based recommendations
